title: hedlundia scannelliana
intro: Hedlundia scannelliana, also known as the Hawaiian hibiscus, is a plant species native to the Hawaiian Islands. It is a type of shrub or small tree with showy flowers, which has been used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits. The medicinal properties of Hedlundia scannelliana include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating wounds, infections, and other health issues. Herbal preparations of Hedlundia scannelliana, such as teas and infusions, are often used to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and support overall health and well-being.
